3206880.name: Rewild
3206880.description: Brought to you by a solo indie game developer: Rewild takes you on a mysterious adventure as you follow the trail of your missing uncle, who was not just a farmer but also a brilliant engineer. After a mysterious crater appears and your uncle vanishes, you uncover a world filled with secrets. Alongside unexpected allies, including a detective and an intelligent species struggling with the effects of pollution, you unravel a deep conspiracy. Can you restore balance between worlds and save your uncle’s legacy? Discover the answer in this immersive and challenging adventure.
3206880.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
